title: Pomkot's Mech Bossbar
description: A custom bossbar made for the mod "Pomkot's Mech". The boss bar is inspired from Armored Core
body:
This texture pack is only made for Pomkot's Mech Mod, but can also be used for normal gameplay. It uses the red bossbar so it only affects that one.

This texture pack will probably be not updated, so feel free to update it all you want
